summary: Manage the outlines of your church meetings. Create programs with ordered items (songs, prayers, readings, sermon, etc.), then print them for distribution.

sections.title: Getting Started
sections.content: Go to Church Meetings > Meeting Outlines to create your first meeting. Set the date, title, type and preacher, then add items to build the outline.

sections.title: Item Types
sections.content: Each item in the outline has a type: Song, Prayer, Bible Reading, Sermon, Offering, Announcements, Communion, or Other. You can also set a duration and a responsible person for each item.

sections.title: Printing
sections.content: Once your meeting outline is ready, click the Print button to get a clean, printable view of the meeting outline.

sections.title: Status
sections.content: Meetings can be in Draft (work in progress) or Published (finalized) status.
